updatedRows.paper_name: The Objective Morality Project: An Expedition to Build a Moral System Everyone Has Reason to Obey
updatedRows.sheet_title: The Objective Morality Project: An Expedition to Build a Moral System Everyone Has Reason to Obey
updatedRows.summary: Constructs and pressure-tests the components required for an objective moral system, explains why no examined candidate earns the promised combination of truth, authority, access, and guidance, and develops a public-reasoning method grounded in explicit human stakes, evidence, safeguards, dissent, and repair.
